title: Srdja Matovic
text: Home * People * Srdja Matovic Srdja Matovic [1] Srdja Matovic , a German born, Montenegrin computer scientist, software developer, and former member of the Internet Technologies Group at the Hamburg University of Applied Sciences [2] . As computer chess programmer, Srdja is author of the Zeta family of chess engines, which are Zeta Dva , a conventional engine written in plain C , Zeta , written in OpenCL , a language suited for GPUs , and the 6502 retro program Zeta Vintage [3] .
